comment: oxo-board-fn build (s009 arcade-scoreboard). rootDir is the lambda root so the board handler + its hexagonal domain/port/adapters under board/ compile into board/dist. tsc nests the handler at board/dist/board/handler.js — the CDK handler entry for oxo-board-fn is therefore 'board/handler.handler' (asset path board/dist). Mirrors the games/ + ws/ tsconfig pattern.
